sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89752" key="prosmhxanhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσμηχᾰν-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n89752.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must contrive besides</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:7:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.12</biblScope> </bibl> tit.</sense> </entryFree>
